title: Slack node returns only metadata instead of binary file
symptom: When using the Slack node to get a file, it only returns metadata and not the actual binary file.
applies_when: Using Slack node with 'Get file' operation
Expecting to download a binary file
not_this_if: Using a different node for file retrieval
root_cause: The Slack node is designed to return file metadata, and to obtain the actual file, a separate HTTP request must be made using the provided file URL. This is a limitation in how the Slack node handles file downloads.
fix_steps: Use the URL provided in the Slack node output (url_private_download).
Add an HTTP Request node to your workflow.
Set the HTTP Request node to use the file URL and configure it to return the file as a binary response.
Connect the HTTP Request node to the next step in your workflow to send the file to its destination.
agent_instruction: Make an HTTP request to the file URL to download the binary file.
